method: Public .json endpoints + DOM observation + body_html analysis
notes: Source store does NOT use product metafields for composition/fit/code — this data is embedded in product body_html as structured <ul><li> items
Metafields are null in the public JSON endpoint — source store does not expose metafields publicly
Loox review metafields exist in theme code but are inactive (all null values)
Product tags are used extensively for filtering: GENDER, MODEL, SEASON, COLOR, FIT, STYLE, COLLECTION, TYPE1/TYPE2
We define metafields in the TARGET store to properly structure data that is embedded in body_html in the source

in_product_fields.product_type: Varies — model name (AGNES) or category (Shorts, Camicie)
in_product_fields.options: Size (Italian Size or Size, values: 25-46 range)

target_metafield_definitions.name: Composition
target_metafield_definitions.description: Material composition extracted from body_html (e.g. '94% Cotton 05% Polyester 01% Elastane')

target_metafield_definitions.name: Fit
target_metafield_definitions.description: Fit type (Slim, Regular, Relaxed, Extra Slim, etc.)

target_metafield_definitions.name: Model Name
target_metafield_definitions.description: Model/line name (Milan, New York, Turin, Chile, Agnes, etc.)

target_metafield_definitions.name: Manufacturing
target_metafield_definitions.description: Special manufacturing process (e.g. 'Teint en pièce', 'Garment dyed')

target_metafield_definitions.name: Size Guide
target_metafield_definitions.description: Size conversion table (IT/US/FR/DE/UK) in rich text format

admin_api_mutations: mutation { metafieldDefinitionCreate(definition: { name: "Composition", namespace: "custom", key: "composition", type: "single_line_text_field", ownerType: PRODUCT, pin: true }) { createdDefinition { id name } userErrors { field message } } }

mutation { metafieldDefinitionCreate(definition: { name: "Product Code", namespace: "custom", key: "product_code", type: "single_line_text_field", ownerType: PRODUCT, pin: true }) { createdDefinition { id name } userErrors { field message } } }

mutation { metafieldDefinitionCreate(definition: { name: "Fit", namespace: "custom", key: "fit", type: "single_line_text_field", ownerType: PRODUCT, pin: true }) { createdDefinition { id name } userErrors { field message } } }

mutation { metafieldDefinitionCreate(definition: { name: "Model Name", namespace: "custom", key: "model_name", type: "single_line_text_field", ownerType: PRODUCT, pin: true }) { createdDefinition { id name } userErrors { field message } } }

mutation { metafieldDefinitionCreate(definition: { name: "Manufacturing", namespace: "custom", key: "manufacturing", type: "single_line_text_field", ownerType: PRODUCT }) { createdDefinition { id name } userErrors { field message } } }

mutation { metafieldDefinitionCreate(definition: { name: "Size Guide", namespace: "custom", key: "size_guide", type: "rich_text_field", ownerType: PRODUCT }) { createdDefinition { id name } userErrors { field message } } }
